title: Proclamation No. 757, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 757

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES ONE PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF BETUAGA, MUNUCIPAL DISTRICT OF BONTOC, MOUNATAIN PROVINCE (SUB-PROVINCE OF BONTOC), ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Betuagan, municipal district of Bontoc, Mountain Province (Sub-Province of Bontoc), island of Luzon, and particularly described in plan, Psu-111499, to wit:

Psu-111499.

A parcel of land, (the original plan Psu-111499, G. L. R. O. Record No.       ), situated in the Barrio of Betuagan, Municipal District of Bontoc, Mountain Province (Sub-Province of Bontoc), Island of Luzon. Bounded on the SE. by property of Cotalan & Anglalan et al (Joint owners); on the S. and SW., by property of Langchasen and Oy-ya et al (joint owners); and on the NW., by property of Olosan & Colal-lad et al (joint owners). Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 72 deg. 48’E., 4391.90 m. more or less from B.L.B.M. No. 1, Bo. of Sacasacan, Mpl. Dist. of Sadanga,

thence N. 81 deg. 14’E., 178.68 m. to point 2; thence S. 6 deg. 25’W., 98.49 m. to point 3; thence S. 14 deg. 10’W., 88.05 m. to point 4; thence S. 81 deg. 17’W., 42.52 m. to point 5; thence N. 32 deg. 08’W., 191.82 m. to point beginning;

containing an area of TWENTY THOUSAND SIXTY TWO (20, 062) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point 1 is marked by P.L.S. Conc. Mon.15 x 15 x 60 cm.; points 2 and 5 by P.L.S. Stone Mon.15 x 15 x 60 cm.; point 3 by P.L.S. Stone Mon 20 x 20 x 60 cm.; and point 4 by P.L.S. Stone Mon. 15 x 20 x 60 cm.; bearings true; declination 0. deg. 36’E.; date of survey, March 2-5, 1940 and that of the approval, August 14, 1940.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this 30 th day of September, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

(Sgd.) MANUEL L. QUEZON

By the President: (Sgd.) JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
